text.title: Spatial UX Fundamentals Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Spatial UX Fundamentals end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: assign-zones
step.action: Place each component into inner / middle / outer zone.

step.name: pick-affordance-method
step.action: Pick primary cue (depth / parallax / occlusion) per interactive element.

step.name: spec-motion-velocity
step.action: Cap velocity ≤0.5 m/s within 1m; verify each animation.

step.name: estimate-session-duration
step.action: Estimate session duration; tune zones if duration high.

step.name: validate-and-store
step.action: Run validator; commit to spatial-spec store.
